name: Blog Pipeline Agent
description: Parent orchestrator (WayFlow Flow OAS, D5) composing the 4 blog generation agents as child FlowNodes: blog-idea-generator-agent → (idea selection) → blog-draft-writer-agent → blog-image-prompt-agent + blog-linkedin-writer-agent. Manual brief / reference artifacts input only — transcript DROPPED. projectId threaded across all child nodes. Two deterministic seam ApiNodes (selected_idea, draft_projection) bridge the idea-array→draft-object and draft-object→linkedin-string shape gaps (email-outreach passthrough precedent). Zero skill-id declarations (owner law).

cinatra.inputContract: Manual brief / reference artifacts only. Transcript input is DROPPED.

data.system: You are a stateless blog-idea-generator agent. Follow the SKILL.md step-by-step. Return a single JSON object {ideas:[{title, summary, outline:[...]}], notes} — nothing else; no markdown wrapping; no prose preface.

cinatra.description: Single ApiNode → /api/llm-bridge. Bridge auto-discovers SKILL.md from agents/cinatra/blog-idea-generator-agent/skills/blog-idea-generator-agent/SKILL.md (via agent_id). metadata.cinatra.toolboxes is INTENTIONALLY OMITTED so default toolbox injection runs; the SKILL.md instructs the LLM NOT to call any MCP primitive — ideas are generated purely from inline inputs. No HITL gates; the LLM returns the JSON envelope and the run completes.

ctx-ideaContext-emit_context_payload.name: Emit resolved context as agent message
ctx-ideaContext-emit_context_payload.message: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ candidates }} {{ slotMeta }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"candidates":{{ candidates | tojson }},"slotMeta":{{ slotMeta | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

data.userResponse: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ slotId }} {{ resolutionMode }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"slotId":{{ slotId | tojson }},"resolutionMode":{{ resolutionMode | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

gateSteps.name: Blog ideas
gateSteps.description: Review the blog ideas output before continuing the pipeline.

data.system: You are a stateless blog draft writer agent. Follow the SKILL.md step-by-step. Do NOT call any MCP tool. Return a single JSON object with {draft: {title, excerpt, content, sourcesUsed?}, notes} — nothing else, no Markdown wrapping.

cinatra.description: Single ApiNode → /api/llm-bridge. Bridge auto-discovers SKILL.md from agents/cinatra/blog-draft-writer-agent/skills/blog-draft-writer-agent/SKILL.md (via agent_id). metadata.cinatra.toolboxes is INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — codex-locked decision #5: this leaf does not call web_search; caller chains @cinatra-ai/web-research-agent upstream if research is needed. SKILL.md forbids all MCP tool calls — this is a pure LLM-only generation leaf.

ctx-draftContext-emit_context_payload.name: Emit resolved context as agent message
ctx-draftContext-emit_context_payload.message: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ candidates }} {{ slotMeta }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"candidates":{{ candidates | tojson }},"slotMeta":{{ slotMeta | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

data.userResponse: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ slotId }} {{ resolutionMode }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"slotId":{{ slotId | tojson }},"resolutionMode":{{ resolutionMode | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

gateSteps.name: Blog draft
gateSteps.description: Review the blog draft output before continuing the pipeline.

data.system: You are a stateless blog image-prompt generator. Follow the SKILL.md step-by-step. Return a single JSON object with {prompts, notes} — nothing else.

cinatra.description: Single ApiNode → /api/llm-bridge. Bridge auto-discovers SKILL.md from agents/cinatra/blog-image-prompt-agent/skills/blog-image-prompt-agent/SKILL.md (via agent_id). No toolboxes — the LLM generates image prompts from the supplied draft using its own world knowledge; no MCP primitive calls, no web_search needed.

ctx-imagePromptContext-emit_context_payl.name: Emit resolved context as agent message
ctx-imagePromptContext-emit_context_payl.message: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ candidates }} {{ slotMeta }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"candidates":{{ candidates | tojson }},"slotMeta":{{ slotMeta | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

data.userResponse: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ slotId }} {{ resolutionMode }} {{ selectedRefs }} #}{"slotId":{{ slotId | tojson }},"resolutionMode":{{ resolutionMode | tojson }},"selectedRefs":{{ selectedRefs | tojson }}}

cinatra.description: Child generation FlowNode → @cinatra-ai/blog-image-prompt-agent. The in-pipeline image-BYTES producer is the asset-blog blog_image_generate_* path (job 3 / generateBlogImage…), whose materializer produces @cinatra-ai/blog-image-artifact via createSemanticArtifact + assertSemanticType({assertedBy:'agent'}). blog-image-prompt-agent stays TEXT-only (emits prompts, NO produces).

gateSteps.name: Image prompts
gateSteps.description: Review the image prompts output before continuing the pipeline.

data.system: You are a stateless blog LinkedIn writer agent. Follow the SKILL.md step-by-step. Do NOT call any MCP tool. Return a single JSON object with {post, notes} — nothing else, no Markdown wrapping.

cinatra.description: Single ApiNode → /api/llm-bridge. The bridge auto-discovers SKILL.md from this agent's own skills/blog-linkedin-writer-agent/SKILL.md via agent_id (same convention as blog-draft-writer-agent). metadata.cinatra.toolboxes INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — pure LLM-only generation leaf, no web_search, no MCP. SKILL.md content was relocated from packages/asset-blog/skills/generate-linkedin-post. NO skill-id declarations anywhere (owner law: no skill-id field).

gateSteps.name: LinkedIn post
gateSteps.description: Review the linkedin post output before continuing the pipeline.

emit_ideas_payload.name: Emit offered ideas as agent message
emit_ideas_payload.message: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ ideas }} #}{"ideas":{{ ideas | tojson }}}

cinatra.description: Human selects exactly one BlogIdea from idea_flow.ideas; emits the chosen idea as a JSON string (InputMessageNode emits one string output — wayflow-input-message-node-contract).

Deterministic seam: parses idea_selection_gate.selectedIdeaJson (validated against idea_flow.ideas) into a typed BlogIdea object for blog-draft-writer-agent.idea. Mirrors the email-outreach context_setup string-gate→passthrough→typed-output bridge (_shape 'blog_pipeline_selected_idea'; passthrough route per-_shape shaper).

Deterministic seam: projects blog-draft-writer-agent.draft (object {title,excerpt,content}) into the string fields blog-linkedin-writer-agent needs (postTitle/postExcerpt/blogPostContent). _shape 'blog_pipeline_draft_projection' via the passthrough route per-_shape shaper.

emit_draft_payload.name: Emit generated draft as agent message
emit_draft_payload.message: {# pyagentspec-input-hint (do not remove): {{ draft }} #}{"draft":{{ draft | tojson }}}

cinatra.description: Human reviews the generated blog draft before it is projected for downstream channels; emits an approval note (InputMessageNode emits one string output — wayflow-input-message-node-contract). This is the runtime HITL pause where continuous-learning skill-autosave capture fires.
